select_when: The current conclusion is vulnerable to inside-view confidence and needs independent challenge before it hardens into a decision.
A team is approaching consensus too smoothly, and dissent, critique, or outside scrutiny may surface missing assumptions.
An important judgment would improve if alternative perspectives attacked the reasoning before reality does.
The thinker needs structured feedback that tests the logic, incentives, and blind spots in the current view.
avoid_when: The review loop is becoming social reassurance, vague brainstorming, or status theater instead of independent challenge.
The decision already has enough external challenge and now needs commitment, execution, or ownership rather than another round of perspective collection.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model focused on independent critique, outside challenge, and anti-consensus complacency rather than on generic collaboration language.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor collaboration sprawl because the raw source is stronger on dissent quality, independent review, and anti-group-drift pressure.
open_questions: The output type compresses a source that also spans communication hygiene, expert review, and perspective diversity.

select_when.note: The raw source explicitly recommends exposing reasoning to critique, independent viewpoints, and perspective-testing before commitment.

avoid_when.note: Both anti-activation conditions are supported by source warnings against social comfort, shallow feedback, and indefinite critique loops.

input_type.note: The source activates around inside-view and consensus risk, but the compact input label is reviewed normalization.

output_type.note: The source naturally produces a challenged and broadened perspective set; the output label is a compact operational rendering.

reasoning_types.note: The model is strongest as reflective self-correction with structural perspective broadening, while the taxonomy labels remain normalized.
